iti46:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti46:2.1:
“Monks, live with the trainings [in heightened virtue, heightened mind, & heightened discernment] as your reward,
with discernment uppermost, release the essence, & mindfulness the governing principle.
iti46:2.2:
As you live with the trainings as your reward, with discernment uppermost, release the essence,
& mindfulness the governing principle, then one of two fruits can be expected:
iti46:2.3: either gnosis right in the here-&-now, or–if there be any remnant of clinging-sustenance–non-return.”
iti46:3.1: Complete in the training, not subject to falling away,
iti46:3.2: one with discernment uppermost, seeing the stopping, the ending of birth:
iti46:3.3: that sage bears his last body,
iti46:3.4: has shaken off Māra, I tell you, has gone beyond aging.
iti46:4.1: So, always delighting in jhāna, centered,
iti46:4.2: ardent, seeing the stopping, the ending of birth,
iti46:4.3: conquering Māra, along with his armies, monks,
